name: Crispy Air Fryer Fries
description: Crispy, crunchy, healthier than deep fried air fryer french fries are a perfect, delicious, easy side dish everyone loves!

author.name: Courtney ODell
author.description: Recipe by Courtney O’Dell, creator of Sweet Cs Designs — sharing well-tested comfort food recipes and practical cooking guides.

publisher.name: Sweet Cs Designs
publisher.description: Easy Recipes, Keto Recipes, One Pot Meals, and Travel Ideas

recipeInstructions.text: Using a mandoline or sharp knife, slice the potatoes into fries. I don't worry too much about the size of fry I am making- some are bigger, and some are smaller. That's fine!
Next, place your spuds in a nice cool water bath. Completely submerge the fries in water.
Let fries sit one hour. This helps to remove excess starch and will help the fries crisp up more in the oven.
After an hour, drain the water, and pat fries dry with a paper towel.
Toss with a couple tablespoons of olive oil, salt and pepper.
Add fries to bottom of air fryer basket, making sure they are all on the same level (don't stack them on top of each other.)
Cook 15-20 minutes, until crispy and golden brown.
Place on a baking sheet lined with paper towels and a cooling rack over it.
Place in warm oven (set to the minimum temperature, not over 250 degrees) and let rest while other batches of fries are cooking.

video.name: The Best Air Fryer French Fries Recipe
video.description: The Best Easy Air Fryer French Fries Recipe - delicious, crispy and crunchy french fries that taste just like your favorite restaurant - but a healthier french fry you can feel good about serving your family.
